columns.name: feed_product_type
columns.label: Product Type
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: Within a category there are often multiple product types defined.  Selet a product type from the drop down on the template tab or the a value from the valid values tab.

columns.name: item_sku
columns.label: Seller SKU
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: A unique identifier for the product, assigned by the merchant.  The SKU must be unique for each product listed.  After you have established a SKU for a product, please do not change it without first deleting the original SKU from our systems through a delete feed.

columns.name: brand_name
columns.label: Brand
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: The brand of the product.

columns.name: update_delete
columns.label: Update Delete
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition:
Specifies the type of operation (Update, PartialUpdate or Delete) to be done on the data provided. If left blank, the default behavior is "Update."  Use "Update" whenever you are changing any field in the existing product's information, including reducing the inventory to 0.  Only use "Delete" when you wish to remove a product completely and permanently from the catalog. 

After you have established a SKU for a product, please do not try changing it without first deleting the associated product from our systems through a delete feed.

columns.name: item_name
columns.label: Product Name
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition:
A short title for the product. This will be displayed in bold on the product page and in the title bar of the browser window.

Note: Please *ONLY* include size and color information in child sku titles.  Parent sku titles should never contain size or color information as they represent the entire sku family, not any specfic size or color.
columns.example:
parent sku title: "Kenneth Cole REACTION
Women's Work Space Leather Pump"

child sku title: "Kenneth
Cole REACTION Women's Work Space Black Leather Pump 7.5 M US"

columns.name: external_product_id
columns.label: Product ID
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: A standard, alphanumeric string that uniquely identifies the product. This could be a GCID (16 alphanumeric characters), UPC or EAN. This is a required field if product_id_type is provided.

columns.name: external_product_id_type
columns.label: Product ID Type
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: The type of standard, unique identifier entered in the Product ID field. This is a required field if Product ID is provided.

columns.name: product_description
columns.label: Product Description
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: A text description of the product.  If you see #### signs where you should see the text, clear the format of the cell. This can be done by clicking Edit in main menu, select Clear & then Formats.
columns.example: Can you ever have too much Adrenaline? Not according to millions of runners. Brooks' trustworthy "Go-To Shoe" is back again with the signature mid foot wrap, forefoot capture, and progressive support countless runners rely on and love. Whether you've worn it for years or are trying it for the first time, the Adrenaline delivers the right amount of cushioning and support.

columns.name: item_type
columns.label: Item Type
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: A category that best describes the class of product.

columns.name: model
columns.label: Style Number
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: If applicable, please submit the style number for the product. For most products, this will be the manufacturer's unique number that identifies the product; may also be referred to as model number. Style number will be required if you are using Global Catalog ID (GCID) as your source for product-id

columns.name: model_year
columns.label: model-year
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: Provides the model year for a style of shoe that has the same style name over time, but whose features change over time.

columns.name: closure_type
columns.label: Closure Type
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: Describes type of method used to close item.
columns.example: buckle, D-Ring, flap, Hook-and-Eye, Snaps, Zipper, magnet, Drawstring

columns.name: model_name
columns.label: Model Name
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: The model name of the instrument.

columns.name: part_number
columns.label: Manufacturer Part Number
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: The manufacturer's part number for the product. For most products, this is identical to the model number; however, some manufacturers distinguish between part numbers and model numbers.

columns.name: manufacturer
columns.label: Manufacturer
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: Specify the manufacturer for your product

columns.name: age_range_description
columns.label: Age Range Description
columns.group: Basic
columns.definition: Select one of the following options: Adult, Big Kid, Little Kid, Toddler, Infant
columns.example: Adult, Big Kid, Little Kid, Toddler, Infant

columns.name: target_gender
columns.label: Target Gender
columns.group: Basic

columns.name: main_image_url
columns.label: Main Image URL
columns.group: Images - These attributes provide links to images for a product
columns.definition: The URL where a main image of the product is located.  It's important that this is supplied for all products.

columns.name: other_image_url1
columns.label: Other Image URL
columns.group: Images - These attributes provide links to images for a product
columns.definition:
The URL for additional images of your product.

These images will be shown on the detail page when the customer clicks through to see other views associated with the product.  For example, you can use this field to show the label information or packaging of your product. Upload additional images with different views to the item, or with some emotional surrounding as additional image.

columns.name: swatch_image_url
columns.label: Swatch Image URL
columns.group: Images - These attributes provide links to images for a product
columns.definition: The URL where an image of a color swatch from the product is located.

columns.name: parent_child
columns.label: Parentage
columns.group: Variation - Populate these attributes if your product is available in different variations (for example color or wattage)
columns.definition:
Defines the product within a relationship with another, similar product.  

The "parent" defines the basic data about the product. Parent products are not purchasable; the "parent" product simply specifies the attributes of the product that are common among all of its children and only acts as a place holder.  The "child" products define the possible variations (i.e., size, color) of the parent product and represent the items that are actually for sale.

This field is required if any of the following columns are populated: variation_theme, color, paper_size, maximum_expandable_size, line_size.  If the product does not participate in a variation relationship, use the value "child."

For further information about how to construct a product variation, please refer to this template's "Example" tab.

columns.name: parent_sku
columns.label: Parent SKU
columns.group: Variation - Populate these attributes if your product is available in different variations (for example color or wattage)
columns.definition: If the product is a child product, list the SKU of the parent product which is related.  DO NOT FILL IN THIS FIELD FOR PARENT PRODUCTS.

columns.name: relationship_type
columns.label: Relationship Type
columns.group: Variation - Populate these attributes if your product is available in different variations (for example color or wattage)
columns.definition: Describes the relationship between products that are related. Accessories can be seen on the www.amazon.com site as "Also Recommended" selections on certain detail product pages.  Use this field to create an accessory relationship.

columns.name: variation_theme
columns.label: Variation Theme
columns.group: Variation - Populate these attributes if your product is available in different variations (for example color or wattage)
columns.definition: Describes the parameter(s) by which the parent product may vary.  The value input for this field should be the same for both the parent and child SKUs. Example: If the product varies by size, input the value Size. If the product varies by color, input the value Color.   Terms used for variation themes are created by you the merchant. (e.g. 'count' can be any number that you choose).

columns.name: style_name
columns.label: Style Name
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Provide the style or 'model' name as determined by the manufacturer
columns.example: If the title is "STEVEN by Steve Madden Women's Intyce Riding Boot", then the style-name is 'Intyce'.

columns.name: generic_keywords
columns.label: Generic Keyword
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Search terms that describe your product: no repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
columns.example: Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana

columns.name: team_name
columns.label: team-name
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Describes the name of the sports team for licensed footwear

columns.name: lens_color
columns.label: Lens Color
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
color of the eyewear lens

Note: Please do *NOT* add color information to parent skus.  Only child skus should have color information associated to them.

columns.name: lens_color_map
columns.label: Lens Color Map
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
If the color used to describe the *lens* is nonstandard (e.g., sage), include the standard color you wish to map to (e.g., green).

Note: Please do *NOT* add color information to parent skus.  Only child skus should have color information associated to them.

columns.name: magnification_strength
columns.label: Magnification Strength
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Used to explain magnification strength of reader glasses to the customer

columns.name: frame_material_type
columns.label: Frame Material Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Describes the material type used in the frame of the product.

columns.name: lens_material_type
columns.label: Lens Material Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Describes the material type of the lens.

columns.name: polarization_type
columns.label: Polarization Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Describes the type of polarization applied to the lens.

columns.name: department_name
columns.label: Department
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: The department of clothing (men's, women's, etc.) in which the product is found.

columns.name: color_name
columns.label: Color
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
The color of the product.

Note: Please do *NOT* add color information to parent skus.  Only child skus should have color information associated to them.

columns.name: color_map
columns.label: Color Map
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
If the color used to describe the product is nonstandard (e.g., sage), include the standard color you wish to map to (e.g., green).

Note: Please do *NOT* add color information to parent skus.  Only child skus should have color information associated to them.

columns.name: size_name
columns.label: size
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
A size value appropriate to the product. 

Note: Please do *NOT* add size information to parent skus.  Only child skus should have size information associated to them.
columns.example:
10 M US Men

7 M US Women

43 EU / 10 US Men

5 M US Toddler

columns.name: material_type
columns.label: Material Fabric
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: List all fabrics, separated by /, and % of each from most to least. Always add “viscose” or “rayon” if listing bamboo, and “azlon” if listing soy. Correct: “100% soy from azlon” or “90% cotton/10% rayon.” Incorrect: “50% bamboo and 50% soy” or “cotton/poly.”

columns.name: fur_description
columns.label: Fur Description
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: If product contains real fur, include fur origin country. Also note if the fur is dyed/colored or if the fur is used, damaged, or contains paws, bellies, tails or waste. Correct: “Natural rabbit fur (Korea)/Dyed lamb shearling (China).” Do not use “haircalf” as a description.

columns.name: is_autographed
columns.label: Is Autographed
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicate if this product is autographed.  This  is a true/false answer.  TRUE; FALSE

columns.name: metal_type
columns.label: Metal Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicate the type of metal used in your product.

columns.name: item_type_name
columns.label: Item Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Describe the type of the apparel

columns.name: lens_type
columns.label: Lens Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search

columns.name: seasons
columns.label: Season of the Product
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition:
The seasonal collection associated with the product.  

Customers can filter on this attribute therefore we highly recommend that you fill out this field.

columns.name: athlete
columns.label: Athlete
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Name of the player the product represents.
columns.example: Peyton Manning, LaDainian Tomlinson, Tom Brady

columns.name: collection_name
columns.label: Collection
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: The seasonal collection associated with the product.  Customers can filter on this attribute therefore we highly recommend that you fill out this field.

columns.name: ultraviolet_light_protection
columns.label: ultraviolet_light_protection
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: The level of UV Protection provided by this product.

columns.name: fit_type
columns.label: Fit Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search

columns.name: frame_type
columns.label: Frame type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: The structure of the frame

columns.name: ring_size
columns.label: Ring Size
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicate the size of the ring, according to US sizing standards.

columns.name: weave_type
columns.label: Weave Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search

columns.name: theme
columns.label: theme
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicates the theme of the costume or novelty clothing.

columns.name: league_name
columns.label: League Name
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicate the professional body that governs the competition of the team or group you are listing.

columns.name: magnification_strength_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Magnification Strength Unit of Measure
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Unit of Measure for Magnification Strength

columns.name: lifecycle_supply_type
columns.label: Product Lifecycle Supply Type
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search

columns.name: lens_coating_description
columns.label: UV Protection details
columns.group: Discovery - These attributes have an effect on how customers can find your product on the site using browse or search
columns.definition: Indicate the type of UV protection

columns.name: duration_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Duration Unit
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.

columns.name: legal_compliance_certification_certifying_authority_name
columns.label: Certifying Authority Name
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.
columns.definition: Provide the certificate's certifying authority
columns.example: Intertek- a CARB approved Third Party Certifier (TPC)

columns.name: subject_character
columns.label: character
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.
columns.definition: character
enumValues: Are You Afraid of the Dark?
Jake and the Never Land Pirates
My Life As A Teenage Robot
Parental Discretion with Stefanie Wilder Taylor
You Can't Do That On Television
You Cant Do That On Television

columns.name: duration
columns.label: Duration
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.

columns.name: legal_compliance_certification_geographic_jurisdiction
columns.label: Geographic Jurisdiction
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.
columns.definition: Provide the jurisdiction related to the certification

columns.name: sub_brand_name
columns.label: Sub Brand
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.

columns.name: flash_point_unit_of_measure

columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.

columns.name: sleeve_type
columns.label: Sleeve Type
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.
columns.definition: Describes details of sleeve.

columns.name: fabric_wash
columns.label: Fabric Wash
columns.group: Product Enrichment - These attributes create rich product listings for your buyers.

columns.name: item_shape
columns.label: Item Shape
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Describes the shape of the item.

columns.name: lens_width
columns.label: Lens Width
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: width of lens in millimeters (mm)

columns.name: bridge_width
columns.label: Bridge Width
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: width of bridge in millimeters (mm)

columns.name: arm_length
columns.label: Arm Length
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: arm length in millimeters (mm)

columns.name: lens_height
columns.label: Lens Height
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Lens Height

columns.name: bridge_width_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Unit of Measure for Width of the Bridge
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Indicates the unit of measurement for width of the bridge

columns.name: lens_width_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Lens Width Unit of Measure
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Indicates the unit of measure for width of the lens

columns.name: size_map
columns.label: Size Map
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Indicate the standard size name for your product. If SizeName is present SizeMap should be populated. Please refer the Sporting Goods Style guide for a list of standard Size_Name Values.

columns.name: lens_height_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Lens Height Unit of Measure
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Indicates the unit of measure the width of the lens

columns.name: arm_length_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Arm Length Unit of Measure
columns.group: Dimensions - These attributes specify the size and weight of a product
columns.definition: Indicates the unit of measure for width of the lens

columns.name: package_height
columns.label: Package height
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The height measurement of the package. If you are an FBA seller and are using a non-default value for fulfillment_center_id, package height is required and must be populated.

columns.name: package_width
columns.label: Package Width
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The width measurement of the package. If you are an FBA seller and are using a non-default value for fulfillment_center_id, package width is required and must be populated.

columns.name: package_length
columns.label: Package Length
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The length measurement of the package. If you are an FBA seller and are using a non-default value for fulfillment_center_id, package length is required and must be populated.

columns.name: package_length_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Package Length Unit Of Measure
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The unit of measure used to describe the dimensions (width, length, height) of the package expressed in inches, centimeters, or feet.

columns.name: package_weight
columns.label: Package Weight
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The weight of the package.

columns.name: package_weight_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Package Weight Unit Of Measure
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.
columns.definition: The unit of measure used to describe the weight of the package, expressed in kilograms, ounces, or pounds.

columns.name: package_height_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Package Height Unit Of Measure
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.

columns.name: package_width_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Package Width Unit Of Measure
columns.group: Fulfillment - Use these columns to provide fulfillment-related information for either Amazon-fulfilled (FBA) or seller-fulfilled orders.

columns.name: fabric_type
columns.label: Fabric Type
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: List all fabrics, separated by /, and % of each from most to least. Always add “viscose” or “rayon” if listing bamboo, and “azlon” if listing soy. Correct: “100% soy from azlon” or “90% cotton/10% rayon.” Incorrect: “50% bamboo and 50% soy” or “cotton/poly.”

columns.name: import_designation
columns.label: Import Designation
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: If made in US from imported materials select “Made in USA and Imported.” If some units are from US and some imported select “Made in USA or Imported.” If made in US from US materials select “Made in USA.” If made outside the USA, select “Imported.”
enumValues: Made in the USA or Imported
Made in the USA and Imported

columns.name: cpsia_cautionary_statement
columns.label: Cpsia Warning
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition:
Select from the following Valid Values: 
choking_hazard_balloon
choking_hazard_contains_a_marble
choking_hazard_contains_small_ball
choking_hazard_is_a_marble
choking_hazard_is_a_small_ball
choking_hazard_small_parts
no_warning_applicable

columns.name: item_weight_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Item Weight Unit
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: The unit of measure used to describe the weight of the product without shipping material.

columns.name: item_weight
columns.label: Item Weight
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: The weight of the product.

columns.name: country_of_origin
columns.label: Country of Origin
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Please refer to the list of values in the dropdown menu.
enumValues: S. Georgia and S. Sandwich Isls.

columns.name: batteries_required
columns.label: Is this product a battery or does it utilize batteries?
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: An internal rechargeable, non-replaceable battery (e.g. laptop battery) is also considered a battery.

columns.name: are_batteries_included
columns.label: Batteries are Included
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"

columns.name: battery_cell_composition
columns.label: Battery composition
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Commonly printed on the battery or outer packaging

columns.name: battery_weight
columns.label: Battery weight (grams)
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Provide the total net weight of the batteries included. This is the weight of the standalone batteries not including packaging or the device it may be used in.

columns.name: battery_weight_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Battery Weight Unit
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Unit of measure used to describe the battery weight

columns.name: number_of_lithium_metal_cells
columns.label: Number of Lithium Metal Cells
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Total number of Lithium cells (of type Metal) in the product, where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery.

columns.name: number_of_lithium_ion_cells
columns.label: Number of Lithium-ion Cells
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Total number of Lithium cells (of type Ion) in the product, where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery.

columns.name: lithium_battery_packaging
columns.label: Lithium Battery Packaging
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: “Batteries only”: the battery or batteries are sold alone or with items they are not meant to power. “With equipment”: the battery is included in the package but not pre-installed. “In equipment”: the battery is pre-installed in the item.
columns.example: Batteries contained in equipment, Batteries packed with equipment, Batteries only

columns.name: lithium_battery_energy_content
columns.label: Watt hours per battery
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Commonly printed on the battery or outer packaging

columns.name: lithium_battery_energy_content_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Lithium Battery Energy Content Unit
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Indicate unit of measure if Lithium Battery Energy Content is populated

columns.name: lithium_battery_weight
columns.label: Lithium content (grams)
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Commonly found in manufacturer's technical information

columns.name: lithium_battery_weight_unit_of_measure
columns.label: Lithium Battery Weight Unit
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Select the unit of measure for Lithium Battery Weight  . If Lithium Battery Weight  is used, you must also enter theLithium Battery Weight  Unit Of Measure.

columns.name: hazmat_united_nations_regulatory_id
columns.label: Hazmat
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Usually found in the Safety Data Sheet or procured from the manufacturer/distributor. For more information, refer to the help pages.

columns.name: safety_data_sheet_url
columns.label: Safety Data Sheet (SDS or MSDS) URL
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: Can be procured from the manufacturer/distributor. For more information, refer to the help pages.

columns.name: california_proposition_65_chemical_names1
columns.label: California Proposition 65 Chemical Name(s)
columns.group: Compliance - Attributes used to comply with consumer laws in the country or region where the item is sold
columns.definition: This attribute captures information needed from suppliers which is used to display applicable California Proposition 65 warnings on the detail page
enumValues: Aloe Vera, non-decolorized whole leaf extract
Bitumens, extracts of steam-refined and air refined
Ceramic fibers (airborne particles of respirable size)
Etoposide in combination with cisplatin and bleomycin
Hydrogen cyanide (HCN) and cyanide salts (CN salts)
Methyl bromide, as a structural fumigant
Quinoline and its strong acid salts
Tobacco, oral use of smokeless products
Strong inorganic acid mists containing sulfuric acid
Silica, crystalline (airborne particles of respirable size)
Soots, tars, and mineral oils (untreated and mildly treated oils and used engine oils)
Emissions from high-temperature unrefined rapeseed oil
Retinol/retinyl esters, when in daily dosages in excess of 10,000 IU, or 3,000 retinol equivalents.
Carbon black (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)
2,4-Hexadienal (89% trans, trans isomer; 11% cis, trans isomer)
Herbal remedies containing plant species of the genus Aristolochia
Toxins derived from Fusarium moniliforme (Fusarium verticillioides)
Chlorinated paraffins (Average chain length, C12;approximately 60 percent chlorine by weight)
Titanium dioxide (airborne, unbound particles of respirable size)
Cyanide salts that readily dissociate in solution (expressed as cyanide)f
Polychlorinated biphenyls (containing 60 or more percent chlorine by molecular weight)
Neonatal infant boys, age 0 to 28 daysb
Infant boys, age 29 days to 24 monthsb
Perfluorooctane sulfonic acid (PFOS) and its salts and transformation and degradation precursors

columns.name: pesticide_marking_registration_status1
columns.label: Pesticide Registration Status
enumValues: This product is a pesticide or pesticide device, as defined under the U.S. Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act.
This product is not a pesticide or pesticide device, as defined under the U.S. Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act.
This product qualifies for an exemption from registration under the U.S. Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act.

columns.name: list_price
columns.label: List Price
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: Manufacturer's suggested retail price or list price for the product. This is not the same as the offering price, which is specified in the item-price field.

columns.name: condition_type
columns.label: Item Condition
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: A numerical entry that indicates the condition of the item. Review the condition guidelines definitions.

columns.name: condition_note
columns.label: Condition Note
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: Descriptive text explaining the item’s condition. This Condition Note field is limited to 1000 characters for all Used, Collectible, and Refurbished items. Condition notes are not accepted for products with a condition type of new.
columns.example: Slightly used with no scratches or cracks

columns.name: product_tax_code
columns.label: Product Tax Code
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: Amazon.com's standard code to identify the tax properties of a product.

columns.name: merchant_release_date
columns.label: Release Date
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: The first date on which you can deliver a pre-orderable product (one that has never been available prior to this date) to a customer.

columns.name: offering_can_be_gift_messaged
columns.label: Offering Can Be Gift Messaged
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: If you can print a gift message with the item indicate that here.  If left blank, defaults to 'false'.

columns.name: offering_can_be_giftwrapped
columns.label: Is Gift Wrap Available
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: If you can gift wrap an item indicate that here.  If left blank, defaults to 'false'.

columns.name: max_order_quantity
columns.label: Max Order Quantity
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: Maximum number of items that can be ordered

columns.name: merchant_shipping_group_name
columns.label: Shipping-Template
columns.group: Offer - These attributes are required to make your item buyable for customers on the site
columns.definition: Sellers can create a set of ship configurations based on business needs and use cases. The ship configurations can be region based and have rules to set SLA and rate for the region. When listing product to create offer, seller needs to select one ship configuration for the product. The ship configuration will be used to retrieve the valid ship options on the website.

columns.name: business_price
columns.label: Business Price
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: The price at which the merchant offers the product to Verified Business customers, expressed in U.S. dollars. If price exists, business-price should be less than or equal to price, as business-price represents a discount for business customers. The price should be greater than 0. Do not include thousands separators or currency symbols. This field is required if quantity prices are provided.

columns.name: quantity_price_type
columns.label: Quantity Price Type
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: Either fixed or percent. When fixed is selected, quantity prices are expressed in U.S. dollars. When percent is selected, quantity prices are calculated as a percent off the business price.

columns.name: quantity_lower_bound1
columns.label: Quantity Lower Bound 1
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: Quantity thresholds, expressed in units. Business customers who purchase at or above a quantity-lower-bound will be given the corresponding quantity-price. For example, if lower-bound1 is set to 50, quantity-price1 will apply to a purchase of 50 or more units. Sellers can specify up to 5 lower-bounds and must provide a quantity-price for each lower bound. Each lower-bound must be higher than the previous one.

columns.name: quantity_price1
columns.label: Quantity Price 1
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: Quantity-prices, expressed in GBP or as a percent-off the business-price, depending on the chosen quantity-price type. Must provide a lower-bound for each quantity-price. Each quantity-price must be lower than the previous one.

columns.name: progressive_discount_type
columns.label: Progressive Discount Type
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: Fixed price or a percentage off of Business price.

columns.name: progressive_discount_lower_bound1
columns.label: Progressive Discount Lower Bound 1
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: Minimum purchase quantity to receive Progressive Discount Value 1.

columns.name: progressive_discount_value1
columns.label: Progressive Discount Value 1
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: The Fixed Price or Percent Off associated with a minimum purchase of Progressive Discount Lower Bound 1.

columns.name: national_stock_number
columns.label: National Stock Number
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: A alpha-numeric 13 digit code. Code identifying standard material items of supply as defined by NATO

columns.name: unspsc_code
columns.label: United Nations Standard Products and Services Code
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition: An 8 digit code A numeric code classifying products according to the UNSPSC system

columns.name: pricing_action
columns.label: Pricing Action
columns.group: B2B - These B2B offer attributes are required to make your item buyable for business customers on the site
columns.definition:
Specifies the actions that need to be performed on the price attributes of this SKU. The only action currently supported by the system is deleting the business_price.
Set this field to "delete business_price" when you want to remove a previously submitted business_price and any quantity discounts. If left blank, no action will be performed and the contents of this column will be ignored.
